reviews.comment:
Fui a tomar un cafe un sábado a la mañana parece que amanecen de mal humor.
Malisima la atención en el ypf full.
Los playeron todo bien, buenas atención y rapidísimo.

(Translated by Google)
I went for coffee on a Saturday morning; they seemed to wake up in a bad mood. The service at the YPF Full was terrible. However, the attendants were great, with good service and very fast.

reviews.comment:
Últimamente mala atención. No funcionaba el compresor e ingresé con 25 libras y me fui con 17. Un desastre el empleado de las 22Hs.

The service has been terrible lately. The compressor wasn't working, and I went in with 25 pounds of gas and left with only 17. The 10 PM employee was a disaster.
